_source: All copy below is lifted from committed site metadata (src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx generateMetadata, src/app/[locale]/free/page.tsx) and Footer.tsx. No placeholders. Update here when the canonical site copy changes.
name: AICareerPivot
pricingDetail: Free resume-based skill-gap analysis; full personalized roadmap is a $19 one-time unlock (no subscription).

blurbs.short: AI career strategist that turns your resume into a personalized career-pivot roadmap.
blurbs.medium: Stop feeling trapped. Build a personalized career transition roadmap based on your skills, finances, and family constraints. Actionable 6-month, 1-year, and 2-year plans.
blurbs.long: AICareerPivot is your personal AI career strategist. Upload your resume for a free skill-gap analysis, see which career pivots fit you best, and unlock a personalized transition roadmap built around your real skills, finances, and family constraints — with actionable 6-month, 1-year, and 2-year plans. Intro pricing is a $19 one-time unlock, no subscription.
